hooks.command:
node -e "try{const f=require('fs').readFileSync('MEMORY_PATH_PLACEHOLDER/MEMORY.md','utf8');console.log(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:'SessionStart',additionalContext:'## Memory Index (loaded on SessionStart)

'+f.trim()+'

Memory loaded. To read a full domain, use the Read tool on the corresponding path.'}}))}catch(e){console.log(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:'SessionStart',additionalContext:'Memory index not found. Run the install script to set up Synthius-Mem.'}}))}" 2>/dev/null || true
